stemHtml: The selection of the DME frequency for a ILS/DME installation is as follows:

options.a: The DME frequency is paired with the localizer frequency so only the localiser frequency is set.
options.b: The pilot has to insert the channel number and also the X or Y.
options.c: The DME frequency has to be selected by the pilot.
options.d: When an ILS/ DME is flown then selection of the DME has always to be done manually.
